name: MO_2010_Department_of_Natural_Resources_Wild_Areas_shp

This data was derived by digitizing United States Geological Survey (USGS) Digital Orthophoto Quarter Quadrangles (DOQQ) from boundary descriptions and sketches varying in age, content and quality. name: Springs
provider: Missouri Geological Survey Geo-Sciences Technical Resource Assessment Tool
description: This data set contains known and probable spring locations as determined by review of U.S. Geological Survey topographic maps and field verification. It depicts the location of the feature as a point. For more information see http://www.dnr.mo.gov/env/wrc/springs.htm.

name: DHSS Approved Certifying Agencies List
description: The Agencies on this list are approved to issue CMT, L1MA and Insulin Certifications. Please refer to the information listed on this page for contact information and certificate offerings. These agencies are only approved to issue the certifications once the courses have been completed.

columns.name: Counties
columns.description: This column was automatically created in order to record in what polygon from the dataset 'Counties' (ikxf-gfzr) the point in column 'latlng' is located.  This enables the creation of region maps (choropleths) in the visualization canvas and data lens.

columns.name: Missouri Counties
columns.description: This column was automatically created in order to record in what polygon from the dataset 'Missouri Counties' (c8ar-jsdj) the point in column 'latlng' is located.  This enables the creation of region maps (choropleths) in the visualization canvas and data lens.

columns.name: School Districts
columns.description: This column was automatically created in order to record in what polygon from the dataset 'School Districts' (ny2h-ckbz) the point in column 'latlng' is located.  This enables the creation of region maps (choropleths) in the visualization canvas and data lens.

name: LTC CENSUS REPORT
description: The LTC CENSUS REPORT contains all Long Term Care (LTC) facilities licensed by the Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services, Section for Long-Term Care Regulation. The report includes residential care facilities (RCF and RCF*), assisted living facilities (ALF and ALF**), intermediate care facilities (ICF), and skilled nursing facilities (SNF).

name: DHSS Recognized QE Most Active List
description: Discussion/Disclaimer: This is NOT a comprehensive list of Qualified Experts in Radiation Safety (QE's). That expanded list is available on the MRCP's website, by calling MRCP at 573-751-6083 or e-mail MRCP@health.mo.gov. HOWEVER, the more comprehensive list may not accurately represent those QE's that are most interested in taking on new clients. QE's on this list may have additional area(s) of expertise, and other QE's on the expanded list are also available. To assist facilities in finding an

name: DHSS Recognized QE Comprehensive List
description: These individuals have been recognized as Qualified Experts in Radiation Safety, having necessary training and experience to be able to perform dependable radiation surveys. However, DHSS makes no warranty either expressed or implied as to the quality of specific services provided to an individual facility. Complaints regarding QE's can be directed to phone 573-751-6083 or email at MRCP@health.mo.gov. The individuals on this list have indicated their availability to offer radiation safety consul

name: Inventory of Major Medical Equipment in Missouri
description: This report is prepared by the Certificate of Need (CON) Program and does not include all medical equipment in Missouri. Refer to other reliable sources to obtain numbers of existing units for CON proposals.
